name: BroadWebAsia, Inc.
summary: BroadWebAsia, Inc. operates Chinese language Web sites. Its Chinese language Web sites provides social and community entertainment and search services. The company's Web sites include major.tv/china, a major league baseball focused Web site in the simplified Chinese language; and bbmao.com, a Web site for delivering meta-and social search results to Chinese Internet users. It targets an audience of young Chinese Internet users who are in 13-30 year old demographic. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in West Hollywood, California.
